title: Hi, I'm Katrina
paragraphs: I’m someone who thrives on connection and creativity. I genuinely enjoy bringing people together and creating spaces where everyone feels included and comfortable. Whether it’s through shared experiences, group activities, or just making sure the vibe feels right, I tend to be happiest when I’m surrounded by good energy and meaningful interactions.

I’m also drawn to playful, slightly magical moments in everyday life. Things like festivals, holidays, cozy environments, and anything with lights or a bit of sparkle tend to inspire me and recharge my creativity. When I’m not coding, you’ll probably find me listening to audiobooks, crafting something new, or diving into a fun series or game.
